description:
As an Amazon user
  I want to manage my account credentials
  So that I can securely access my account

elements.name: TC-001 - New user registration with valid data

steps.name: I am on Amazon home page
I click on Sign In button
I click on Create Account link
I should see account created message
I should be logged in to dashboard
I should see "Welcome John Doe" message

elements.name: TC-001 - Registration with invalid email format

steps.name: I am on Amazon home page
I click on Sign In button
I click on Create Account link
I should see error message "Invalid email format"
I am on Amazon home page
I click on Sign In button
I click on Create Account link
I should see error message "Password must be at least 8 characters"
I am on Amazon home page
I click on Sign In button
I should be logged in successfully
I should see account menu with my email
I am on Amazon home page
I click on Sign In button
I should see error message "Your password is incorrect"
I should remain on login page
I am on Amazon home page
I click on Sign In button
I should see error message "We cannot find an account"
I am on Amazon home page
I click on Account & Lists menu
I click on Sign Out option
I should be logged out successfully
I should see Sign In button
I should be redirected to home page
I am on Amazon home page
I click on Account & Lists menu
I click on Sign Out option
I try to access account page directly
I should be redirected to login page
I am on Amazon home page
I click on Sign In button
I should be logged in successfully
my email should be pre-filled on next login attempt
I am on Amazon home page
I should see "2FA enabled successfully" message
I should receive OTP on login attempts

name: User Authentication

description:
As an Amazon customer
  I want to search, browse, and purchase products
  So that I can shop efficiently

steps.name: I am on Amazon home page
I press Enter or click Search button
I should see search results page
I should see list of laptop products
I should see price for each product
I am on Amazon home page
I press Enter or click Search button
All products should be within selected price range
All products should be from Dell brand
I am on Amazon home page
I press Enter or click Search button
I select sort option "Price: Low to High"
results should be sorted by ascending price
results should be sorted by rating descending
results should show newest products first

elements.name: TC-005 - Add single product to cart

steps.name: I am on Amazon home page
I click on first product result
I should see product details page
I click Add to Cart button
I should see "Added to Cart" confirmation
I should see success toast message

elements.name: TC-005 - Add multiple items to cart

steps.name: I am on Amazon home page
I click on first product result
I click Add to Cart button
I click on first product result
I click Add to Cart button

elements.name: TC-005 - Add out-of-stock product to cart

steps.name: I am on Amazon home page
I click on first product result
I should see "Out of Stock" message
Add to Cart button should be disabled
I should see "Notify Me" button instead
I am on Amazon home page
I have added "Dell Laptop" to cart
I should see "Dell Laptop" in cart
I click Remove button for "Dell Laptop"
Product should be removed from cart
I am on Amazon home page
I have added "Laptop" quantity 1 to cart
I press Update or click refresh
I am on Amazon home page
I have multiple items in cart
I click on Delete all or Clear Cart option
Message "Your cart is empty" should appear
I am on Amazon home page
I click Proceed to Checkout button
I should see order confirmation page
I am on Amazon home page
I click Proceed to Checkout button
Order should be confirmed with new address

elements.name: TC-007 - Apply coupon code at checkout

steps.name: I am on Amazon home page
I click Proceed to Checkout button
Discount amount should show on summary

elements.name: TC-007 - Checkout with different payment methods

steps.name: I am on Amazon home page
I click Proceed to Checkout button
I should see Amazon Pay confirmation
I go back and select payment method "Credit Card"
I should see credit card fields
I should see debit card fields

name: Shopping Workflows

description:
As an Amazon customer
  I want to manage my orders, returns, and account settings
  So that I can effectively manage my purchases

steps.name: I am on Amazon home page
I have a completed purchase order "#123456"
I select item "Dell Laptop" to return
I am on Amazon home page
I click on my active return
I should see return status "In Progress"
I should see return tracking number
I should see expected refund date
return tracking should open in new window
I am on Amazon home page
I have received wrong item in order
Return should be processed as replacement
I should see replacement shipping options
I am on Amazon home page
I should see Prime benefits page
I should see "Welcome to Prime" message
Free shipping should be enabled on all orders
I am on Amazon home page
I should see all Prime benefits:
I am on Amazon home page
I should see "Membership will expire on [date]"
Free shipping benefits should be removed
I am on Amazon home page
I should see all browsed products
Products should be listed with most recent first

elements.name: TC-010 - Filter browsing history by date

steps.name: I am on Amazon home page
only products from last 30 days should be shown
products from 90 days should be shown
I am on Amazon home page
I should see all purchase orders

elements.name: TC-011 - Filter orders by date range

steps.name: I am on Amazon home page
I have purchase history spanning multiple years
only orders from last 6 months should be shown
detailed order information should be displayed
I am on Amazon home page

elements.name: TC-012 - View Amazon Visa card benefits

steps.name: I am on Amazon home page
I click on Amazon Visa Card
I should see card benefits page

elements.name: TC-012 - Apply for Amazon Visa card

steps.name: I am on Amazon home page
I click on Amazon Visa Card
I am on Amazon home page
I have approved Amazon Visa card

elements.name: TC-013 - Enroll in Amazon Associates program

steps.name: I am on Amazon home page
I should receive affiliate account setup instructions
I am on Amazon home page
shared link should earn commission on clicks

name: Post-Purchase & Account Management
